text.title: Lemon Squeezy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping product type, MoR acceptance, license needs, and affiliate intent to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the product digital + LS-MoR acceptable + ≥1 variant defined?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — use Stripe-direct or invoicing channel

branch.when: any_required_store_field MISSING OR variants.length == 0 OR variants.length > 8
any subscription variant has license_api_enabled == false

text.example: SaaS + EU 35% + LS MoR ok + 3 variants under cap + License API on subs + 3-touch dunning + affiliate 40% → all_gates_green=true → APPROVE.
